title: Under-16s to Be Banned From Social Media, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer Says
description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced plans for a social media ban for under-16s. Starmer said the government hopes to pass regulation before Christmas, with the ban coming into effect by spring 2027.
